title: Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Women - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Women 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Women Homeless Youth Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CATHOLIC CHARITIES HOMELESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides drop-in services including information and referral, showers, laundry facilities, a community meal, snacks, and coffee. Offers access to a phone, community voicemail, mailing address, and computers. 2740 SE Powell Boulevard #5 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Non-parenting women age 25 and older who are experiencing homelessness. Well-mannered pets are allowed. Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-1pm Lunch: 11:30am-1pm Email (971) 222-1880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC CHARITIES HOMELESS SERVICES
